name: lyrics_render
description: Render a lyrics video by burning caption track text onto a background using ffmpeg drawtext. Word-by-word accumulation: each word reveals and the line grows until the phrase ends. Outputs an MP4 with captions baked in.

input.description: Optional background video to loop. If omitted, a solid color background is used.

output.description: MP4 with captions rendered onto background

params.name: captions
params.description: Path to caption track JSON from lyrics_sync or caption step

params.name: bg-color
params.description: Background color when no input video is provided (default: black)

params.name: position
params.description: Caption position: center, top-left, or bottom-left (default: center)

params.name: preview-duration
params.description: Only render this many seconds — useful for quick previews
